message:
fix(search-core,storage,guard,share): fix diversity demotion, make fast embedder optional, fix git lock cleanup

search-core/diversity.rs — Fix diversity demotion logic:
- The previous algorithm iterated candidates once, setting `best_idx`
  to either the first candidate or the first non-violating candidate.
  The `is_near_tied` check compared each candidate against the global
  `top_score`, but this was wrong: a violating candidate at position 0
  with a clear score lead would never be demoted because it was being
  compared to itself. The fix separates tracking of the best violating
  and best valid candidates, then compares their scores directly. A
  violating hit is only demoted (swapped with the next valid hit) if
  the score difference is within `score_tolerance`, preserving ranking
  quality for hits with a clear lead.

search-core/two_tier.rs — Make fast embedder optional:
- `TwoTierSearcher::new()` now accepts `Option<Arc<dyn TwoTierEmbedder>>`
  for the fast embedder instead of requiring it. `search_fast_only()`
  returns `SearchError::ModeUnavailable` when the fast embedder is None.
  This enables graceful degradation when the fast embedding model is
  unavailable (e.g., during cold start or when the embedding service is
  down), allowing quality-only search to proceed.

storage/lib.rs — Fix stale git lock cleanup on non-Linux platforms:
- The previous code had a `#[cfg(not(unix))]` block for force-cleaning
  old locks when start ticks were unavailable, but this only compiled
  on Windows. The actual problem occurs on any platform where
  `process_start_ticks()` returns None (macOS, older Linux kernels
  without /proc/stat). Now checks `owner_start_ticks.is_none() ||
  process_start_ticks(pid).is_none()` at runtime instead of compile-time
  gating, using a more conservative 2x age timeout. This prevents
  permanent git lock deadlocks from PID reuse on macOS.

guard/tests/guard_env_tests.rs:
- Formatting-only: break long `guard_check_full()` and `guard_check()`
  call lines to comply with line length limits.

share/bundle.rs:
- Formatting-only: unwrap multi-line `query_sync` call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
